globalGate.wave: AS / Agent SDK Runtime (base-URL / non-Anthropic models)
globalGate.summary: 8/10 AS-wave slices PASSED with committed green gates: THE FENCE (default-deny Anthropic billing; effective-URL assert incl settings.json #217; scoped purge exception, zero new offenders), THE HARNESS (per-target promptMode full=claude_code preset+settingSources[project]+skills vs lean string, never user settings), the AgentSdkAdapter (RuntimeAdapter conformance + structured awaitResponse + tool-use, no scraping), the budget guard (maxTurns/token ceiling stops+reports), the providers + capability records (DeepSeek text+tool-use only; LiteLLM 1.82.7/1.82.8 forbidden), the delegate() bridge (schema-valid {summary,artifacts} + artifact + log), the MultiRuntimePool (agent-sdk warms keyed incl promptMode, heterogeneous with PTY), and the Quarters-AgentSDK view (committed e2e + verified walkthrough video). Full vitest suite 677 passed; the only red is the PRE-EXISTING, out-of-scope knowledge.mjs --print. The adapter is PROVEN live against the real SDK 0.3.179 + Ollama 0.14.3 (fence/harness/baseUrl/preset/settingSources/tool_use/tokens all correct). BLOCKERS (buildable-remaining 0; each names an external cause + the exact failed remediation commands): AS-ollama-live and AS-route's LIVE gateway route both need a completing live agent-sdk turn, blocked because the locally-pulled Ollama models cannot complete the Claude-Code tool round trip over the Anthropic-compat endpoint (qwen3:8b/full → 'API Error: Content block not found'; qwen2.5:7b/full → stall under the ~14k preset floor; qwen2.5:7b/lean → stall, machine load ~13). Real fix: a tool-tuned local model (none pulled) or a cloud provider key in the Vault (absent). NOT an adapter defect.
globalGate.liveUpdate: 2026-06-17 — AS-route is now PASSED LIVE. Wired the agent-sdk execution branch into the live RoutedGateway (gateway-routing.mjs runAgentSdkTurn + gateway-pty.mjs branch + rich-stream reply/status injection). A web-channel message routes through the orchestrator to agent-sdk/ollama-local/qwen3:0.6b (or claude-code/anthropic/opus per the demo profile), the reply renders in the channel UI with a runtime/model badge, and decisions.jsonl logs runtime+provider+model. Verified walkthrough: http://100.108.210.116:8099/agent-garrison/runtime/agent-sdk-orchestrated/2026-06-17_07-24-21/final.mp4 . THE FIX that unblocked the live turn: a CHAT turn (lean promptMode now auto-disables all built-in tools) is a clean fast path (~9s, qwen3:0.6b) — only the agent-sdk TOOL round trip on small local models remains blocked.

blockers.scope: TOOL round trip only — bare CHAT turns work live through the orchestrator
blockers.cause: locally-pulled Ollama models cannot complete the Claude-Code TOOL round trip (the tool-result content block) over the Anthropic-compat endpoint
blockers.failedRemediation: node fittings/seed/agent-sdk-runtime/scripts/probe-ollama.mjs with PROBE_MODEL=qwen3:8b/full (content-block error), qwen2.5:7b/full (stall), qwen2.5:7b/lean (stall)
blockers.realFix: a tool-tuned local model or a cloud provider key in the Vault
